prestazioni: Engine: Turbocharged 1.8L MZR LF-VE (86mm bore, 86mm stroke, forged crankshaft) with a fully built internals package including Manley forged H-beam connecting rods, JE 8.5:1 compression forged pistons, and ACL Race Series main/rod bearings to handle 350+ whp reliably.

Forced Induction: Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing, 56mm compressor inducer) paired with a custom 3.5" V-band downpipe and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise 22-24 psi mapping on E85.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors, Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, and a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup with -8AN lines to prevent oil buildup in the intake tract under high boost.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (2005-2006 NB2-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler for aggressive stance and downforce at speed.

Suspension: Ohlins DFV Road & Track coilovers (MX-5 NB-specific valving) with 25mm front and 20mm rear Hardrace adjustable camber plates, paired with Cusco front and rear sway bars (22mm front, 19mm rear) for flat cornering.

Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 17x9 +30 front and 17x9.5 +35 rear wheels with 245/40/17 and 275/35/17 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, mounted on NRG Innovations extended wheel studs for proper fitment.
